currentLinkedIn.headline: Senior Finance Manager, FP&A at Notion | SaaS Metrics · Board Reporting · Excel Pro
currentLinkedIn.about: I translate numbers into decisions. Eight years in FP&A at high-growth SaaS companies — I own the financial model, the board deck, and the headcount forecast.

experience.title: Senior Finance Manager, FP&A
bullets: Owned integrated financial model across P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow for a $200M ARR business
Built bottom-up headcount forecast used in Series D fundraise; actual vs. plan variance under 3%
Partnered with Sales and Marketing to redesign CAC and LTV reporting; improved payback period visibility

experience.title: Financial Analyst
bullets: Delivered monthly budget vs. actuals analysis for 15 cost centers and presented findings to VPs
Automated recurring FP&A reports in Python; saved 12 hours per month of manual spreadsheet work
